description: MCP server repos. Isolate the MCP SDK for manual review and keep engines.node unpinned so library consumers keep a broad range. Extend AFTER node.json.

packageRules.description: MCP SDK — review every bump manually. Carved out of the non-major automerge bundle and typed `feat:` so a minor SDK bump triggers a MINOR release-please bump in consumers. This is the fleet's 'hand-picked consumer-facing dependency' opt-in: default.json types routine bumps `deps:` (patch) and majors `feat:` (minor), but a minor SDK bump expands capability this server re-exposes, so it warrants `feat:` on its own. Add a rule like this in any repo where a specific dependency's minor bumps are consumer-facing.
Don't pin engines.node — this is a library and the engines range must stay broad for consumers. Overrides the node preset's default pin behavior.
